questions.question: Define access control in Java and explain its importance.
keyPoints: Importance of access control in OOP

questions.question: Compare and contrast the four access levels in Java with examples.
keyPoints: Code examples for each access level

questions.question: Explain encapsulation in Java and demonstrate its implementation using access control.
keyPoints: Explanation of how access control enables encapsulation

questions.question: List the access modifiers in Java and describe their usage.
keyPoints: List of access modifiers (public, private, protected)
Usage examples for each access modifier

questions.question: Discuss the advantages of using access control in Java programming.
keyPoints: Advantages of access control (data hiding, code security)
Relation to encapsulation and OOP principles
Code examples demonstrating benefits of access control
